title: Schema validator + identifier-resolution checks (CASE GUID / ASN URI)
context: OER are abundant and free but are not indexed against the curriculum standards that govern what teachers must teach, so teachers cannot find the free resource aligned to a given standard. This project builds an open crosswalk of educator-reviewed AlignmentRecords linking OER to standards by stable identifier (CASE GUID / ASN URI), not by reproducing copyrighted standards text. Two hard gates never skip: the dual licence/terms gate (gate-002) and educator review of every record, with a blind second-reviewer precision audit holding precision at >= 95%. This validator enforces the canonical AlignmentRecord model (model-001) and that every standard identifier resolves before a record can ship.
objective: Build the schema validator plus CASE GUID / ASN URI identifier-resolution checks for AlignmentRecords.
acceptanceCriteria: Validates every AlignmentRecord against the canonical model from model-001; records with missing/invalid required fields fail.
Identifier-resolution check: every CASE GUID and ASN URI on a record resolves against the official source; unresolvable identifiers fail.
Ships unit tests with passing and failing fixtures; runs green in CI.
Code MIT; pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint green; the commit is DCO signed-off; no credentials or secrets committed.
